notes: Three search piles at Frog Knows Best: the retail counter (till, fish food, log), the nightcrawler chest cooler (live bait), the W pegboard (lures, hooks).

the_fish_food_canister.label: Fish food (Tetra)
the_fish_food_canister.flavor: Three-quarters full. The same canister Em opened in June. He has been topping it himself when he comes by Friday.

effects.text: Canister in hand. FEED TANK is in your hand.

the_till_key.label: The till key
the_till_key.flavor: Brass, small. On the same ring as the door key. The drawer was counted last night. You can resist counting it again.

the_shift_log_in_ems_handwriting.label: Em's shift log
the_shift_log_in_ems_handwriting.flavor: Spiral. Em started it in '79. Last entry is yours from yesterday: 'June 21. Tanks clean. Pegboards stocked. Theroux on the log. ZERO DELTA on the till.' Em's handwriting will resume Friday.

the_worm_box.label: The worm box
the_worm_box.flavor: Plastic, ventilated. Twenty-eight nightcrawlers in soil. They are, as they should be, alive.

the_label_tape.label: Label tape (Brother P-touch)
the_label_tape.flavor: Em's label maker is the Brother P-touch from '04. The tape is the same tape he has used since.

the_cooler_lid_thermometer.label: Cooler-lid thermometer
the_cooler_lid_thermometer.flavor: Reads 42°F. Spec is 40-45. The worms are happy.

a_red_lure.label: A red lure (Mepps #2)
a_red_lure.flavor: On the third row. The lure Em rated, in the log, in '99 as the lure for the bayou at first light. Has not moved from the third row since spring.

a_yellow_lure.label: A yellow lure
a_yellow_lure.flavor: On the fourth row. The shop's biggest seller in March. The kids buy them for redfish.

a_hook_pack.label: A 6/0 hook pack
a_hook_pack.flavor: Twelve hooks per. Eagle Claw. The pack is in the place the pack has been since you reorganised the wall in February.
